description: Polygon Ecosystem Token (POL) is the native token of Polygon PoS Chain, replacing ERC-20 MATIC for gas fees and staking since late 2024. Today, as an extended utility on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 POL gives original MATIC and POL holders instant finality, ultra-low fees, AI contract capability, and commercialized performance worldwide.
name: Polygon Ecosystem Token
